query:
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'Finans', 'Ciro /Hamburger Adedi', 'Aylık Restoran Cirosu / Satılan Hamburger Adedi', 'TL', 'Aylık', 15, 6460000.0, 6800000.0, 7819999.999999999, NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'Finans', 'Karlılık', 'Aylık Net Kar %si - Kira ve sabit giderlerden arındırılmış', '%', 'Aylık', 15, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'Finans', 'Yan Ürün Satışı', '100 Burger Başına Satış /  Yan Ürün Satışı', '%', 'Aylık', 10, 0.05, 0.055, 0.06, NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'Finans', 'Enerji ve Bakım Onarım Gideri', 'Enerji ve Sabit Giderler / Toplam Ciro', '%', 'Aylık', 0, 0.033, 0.03, 0.025, NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'Finans', 'Gıda/ Malzeme Maliyeti', 'Malzeme Gideri / Toplam Gider', '%', 'Aylık', 10, 0.5, 0.45, 0.4, NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'Müşteri', 'Müşteri Şikayet Oranı', 'Google/ Pazaryeri Toplam Müşteri Başına Şikayet Oranı', '%', 'Aylık', 10, 0.35, 0.3, 0.25, NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'Müşteri', 'Google/Pazar Yerleri Puanı', 'Restoranın Google ve Pazar Yeri Puanlarının Ağırlıklandırılmış Puanı', 'Puan', 'Aylık', 10, 0.043, 0.045, 0.047, NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'İnsan', 'Personel Maliyeti', 'Personel Maliyeti / Toplam Ciro', '%', 'Aylık', 10, 0.3, 0.2, 0.15, NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'İnsan', 'İşgücü Devir Oranı', '3 Aylık Çıkan Personel Sayısı/ Ortalama Personel Sayısı', '%', '3 Aylık', 10, 0.6, 0.4, 0.3, NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
INSERT INTO kpi_targets (branchId, dimension, target, description, unit, frequency, weight, lowerLimit, targetValue, upperLimit, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT b.id, 'İnsan', 'Eğitim Performans Oranı', 'Eğitime Personel Giriş Sayıları: %25, Eğitim Tamamlama Oranı: %25 Eğitim Deneyim Süreleri: %50', '%', 'Aylık', 10, 0.7, 0.85, 0.95, NOW(), NOW()
FROM branches b
WHERE REPLACE(b.name, 'BY ', '') = 'İSTANBUL SEFAKÖY' LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM kpi_targets;
